diff.content:
diff --git a/catalog.py b/catalog.py
--- a/catalog.py
+++ b/catalog.py
@@ -1,2 +1,5 @@
 def optional_product(store, product_id):
-    return store.get(product_id)
+    try:
+        return store.get(product_id)
+    except ProductNotFound:
+        return None

change_contract.goal: Return None when the optional catalog lookup has no product.
preserved_behaviors: Only ProductNotFound represents an absent optional value.

repository_instructions.label: Optional lookup convention
repository_instructions.summary: Optional repository readers translate the domain not-found exception to None at the reader boundary.

nearby_patterns.label: Optional customer lookup
nearby_patterns.summary: Catches only CustomerNotFound and returns None.

validation.name: catalog tests
validation.result: 3 passed including present, missing, and transport failure
